builds_on.name: BERT
builds_on.evidence: “we augment language model pre-training with a latent knowledge retriever”

builds_on.name: k-Nearest Neighbor Language Model
builds_on.evidence: “In the language modeling literature, the k-Nearest Neighbor Language Model (Khandelwal et al., 2019) (kNN-LM) retrieves similar LM examples to improve memorization.”
